findings.location: s6 — code example for bar() method
findings.description: The knowledge file has `int id = Integer.parseInt(request.getPathParam("id"));` with two closing parentheses, but the source has `int id = Integer.parseInt(request.getPathParam("id");` with only one closing parenthesis (missing the closing `)` for `parseInt`). The knowledge file silently corrected what appears to be a typo in the source rather than reproducing it faithfully.

The s5 section content lists all standard HTTP method annotations including `javax.ws.rs.HEAD`, `javax.ws.rs.OPTIONS` (JAX-RS 1.1以上), and `javax.ws.rs.PUT`, but these three are absent from the hints array. Only DELETE, GET, PATCH, and POST are represented in their fully-qualified form.
findings.source_evidence: Source tip lists: javax.ws.rs.DELETE, javax.ws.rs.GET, javax.ws.rs.HEAD, javax.ws.rs.OPTIONS (JAX-RS 1.1 以上), javax.ws.rs.PATCH (JAX-RS 2.1 以上), javax.ws.rs.POST, javax.ws.rs.PUT
